claims.speaker: Mirella Vitale
claims.quote: the West Virginia facility has begun its running process in May, and we expect to be – begin all our commercial operations during the end of this month by late June.
claims.paraphrase: ROCKWOOL expects to begin all commercial operations at the West Virginia facility by late June 2021.
claims.subject: T-west-virginia-factory-startup

claims.speaker: Anthony Abbotts
claims.quote: we expect by the end of the year to be up around 15% or even more compared to the 35% that we need to achieve by end of 2022.
claims.paraphrase: ROCKWOOL expects to achieve around 15% energy efficiency renovation by the end of 2021, compared to the 35% target for the end of 2022.
claims.subject: T-2021-performance-outlook

claims.speaker: Anthony Abbotts
claims.quote: we've saved around €4 million of CapEx.
claims.paraphrase: ROCKWOOL has saved approximately €4 million in CapEx through the renovation of its office in Gladbach.
claims.subject: T-capex-guidance

claims.speaker: Anthony Abbotts
claims.quote: we've avoided 2,500 tonnes of construction waste going to landfill, and we've avoided going to landfill.
claims.paraphrase: ROCKWOOL has avoided 2,500 tonnes of construction waste going to landfill through its renovation project.
claims.subject: T-construction-industry-outlook

claims.speaker: Anthony Abbotts
claims.quote: we've avoided 1,800 tons of CO2 associated with the production of new construction materials if you had done a new build.
claims.paraphrase: ROCKWOOL has avoided 1,800 tons of CO2 emissions through its renovation project compared to a new build.
claims.subject: T-construction-industry-outlook

claims.speaker: Anthony Abbotts
claims.quote: we have been using our reclaimed waste service rock cycle during the renovation project.
claims.paraphrase: ROCKWOOL has utilized its reclaimed waste service, Rock Cycle, during the renovation project.
claims.subject: T-construction-industry-outlook

claims.speaker: Anthony Abbotts
claims.quote: we have achieved the DGNB gold certification, which is extremely difficult to attain for renovation.
claims.paraphrase: ROCKWOOL has achieved the DGNB gold certification for its renovation project, which is difficult to attain.
claims.subject: T-construction-industry-outlook
